Name: Environment Config
Description: Controls color transformation applied to the environment map used for image-based lighting (IBL). Allows artistic adjustment of reflection and ambient lighting contribution without modifying the source texture.

Fields.Name: Environment Map: Color Convert: Hue
Fields.Description: Applies a hue rotation to the environment map colors, shifting all reflected and ambient lighting tones.

Fields.Name: Environment Map: Color Convert: Saturate
Fields.Description: Controls color saturation of the environment map. Higher values increase color intensity, while lower values desaturate toward grayscale.

Fields.Name: Environment Map: Color Convert: Shift
Fields.Description: Per-channel additive color offset applied to the environment map (RGBA). Useful for fine-tuning color balance or introducing a global tint.

Fields.Name: Environment Map: Color Convert: Scale
Fields.Description: Per-channel multiplicative scale applied to the environment map (RGBA). Controls overall intensity and color weighting of reflected and ambient light.
